scenarios.title: Computer Vision Modeling and Augmentation
scenarios.when_to_read: Image augmentation, PIL/Pillow operations, vision datasets/transforms, classification and detection models, segmentation, YOLO/SAM/OpenMMLab workflows, and model export.
scenarios.role: Build, debug, serialize, and integrate Albumentations 2.x augmentation pipelines for images, masks, bboxes, keypoints, volumes, and PyTorch-style datasets.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `albumentations` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: framework integration, pipeline composition, serialization and reproducibility, targets and formats, and transform catalog.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `albumentations` when the request names `albumentations`, centers on building, debugging, serializing, and integrating Albumentations 2.x augmentation pipelines for images, masks, bboxes, keypoints, volumes, and PyTorch-style datasets, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in computer vision modeling and augmentation. Then route to framework integration, pipeline composition, serialization and reproducibility, or targets and formats when those focused workflows match.
